evals.prompt:
帮我解析这个设计系统的颜色：

## Colors
Primary: #0052ef
Canvas: #0b0b0b
Surface: #141414
Text Primary: #e8e8e8
Text Secondary: #9ca3af
Border: #2a2a2a
Accent: #3b82f6
Success: #10b981
Warning: #f59e0b
Error: #ef4444

我们的按钮用 Primary 色，背景用 Canvas，卡片用 Surface。
evals.expected_output: DesignTokens JSON，colors 数组包含至少 10 个 token，每个重要颜色有 dual naming

evals.prompt:
我老板发了一份品牌指南，但我只有颜色部分：

Our brand colors:
- Electric Blue: #2563eb (used for CTAs, links, primary actions)
- Midnight: #0f172a (main background, dark theme)
- Cloud: #f8fafc (light background, light theme)
- Steel: #64748b (secondary text, muted elements)
- Neon Green: #22c55e (success states, positive metrics)
- Hot Coral: #ef4444 (error states, delete actions)
- Font: Inter, sans-serif
- Border radius: 8px for cards, 4px for buttons, 9999px for pills
evals.expected_output: DesignTokens JSON，包含 dual naming，typography 包含 Inter，radius 包含 sm/md/pill
